content.text:
# Boggart Boneboiler

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Boggart Boneboiler |
| **Description** | A bloated, greasy humanoid with slick skin and fat folds glistening under firelight. It reeks of burnt fat, spoiled meat, and sour sweat. Clad in a stained leather apron stretched tight over its bulk, it lumbers about with wet, slapping steps. Its small, beady eyes gleam with cruel delight as it tends to bubbling pots filled with bones and scraps, occasionally dragging victims closer to “the boil.” |
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Size** | Small (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Humanoid |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 12 (leather apron) |
| **Hit Points** | 2d6 + 2 |
| **Strength** | 12 (+1) |
| **Constitution** | 12 (+1) |
| **Agility** | 10 (+0) |
| **Intellect** | 8 (-1) |
| **Piety** | 6 (-2) |
| **Personality** | 10 (+0) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Meat Hook:** +3 to hit, range 1, 1d6 piercing; target suffers **Bleeding** (1d4 damage at the start of its next turn). Combat text: *Boggart Boneboiler lunges at (insert target) with a meat hook!* **Hurl Hot Grease:** +2 to hit, range 3, 2d4 fire damage; **recharge 6** (roll a d6 at the start of its turn and regain use on a 6); target is **Blinded** until the end of its next turn. Combat text: *Boggart Boneboiler hurls a pot of hot grease at (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | A; **Polished Finger Bone** (15%) |
| **Comments** | “Into the pot with ya!”, “Boil ’em slow, tastes better!”, “Oi, don’t waste the juices!”, “This one’ll make a fine broth!”, “Keep stirrin’, lads!”, “Boss wants this one salted!” |
| **Experience** | 50 |

---

## Notes

### Rare Drop
In addition to its normal loot, a Boggart Boneboiler has a chance to drop:
- **Polished Finger Bone** — 15%

### Polished Finger Bone Summary
A smooth, yellowed finger bone, carefully cleaned and buffed to a dull shine.
- non-magical
- worth 25 gp

### XP Note
The submitted stat block listed **25 XP**, but this entry uses **50 XP** to match the current Umberhold experience table for a **Level 2** monster.

# Boggart Gasser

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Boggart Gasser |
| **Description** | A stunted, pot-bellied humanoid swaddled in grime-stiff wrappings and a patchwork hood dark with old soot. Its slick skin is blotched with yellow lesions, and its nostrils are stuffed with greasy moss to blunt the fumes it brews. Glass vials clink from cords across its chest, each one sloshing with corpse-green vapor and rancid slurry. It reeks of rot, vinegar, and spoiled herbs steeped in blood. It cackles as it lobs choking death into clustered foes before scampering back into the murk. |
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Size** | Small (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Humanoid |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 13 (base 10 + Agility + patchwork leathers) |
| **Hit Points** | 2d6 |
| **Strength** | 8 (-1) |
| **Constitution** | 10 (+0) |
| **Agility** | 14 (+2) |
| **Intellect** | 10 (+0) |
| **Piety** | 6 (-2) |
| **Personality** | 8 (-1) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Agility +4 |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | Stealth +4 |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Jagged Shank:** +4 to hit, range 1, 1d4 + 2 piercing damage. Combat text: *Boggart Gasser stabs (insert target)!* **Rotgas Vial (Refresh 5/6):** +4 to hit, range 3, 1d6 poison damage; target must make a **DC 10 Constitution save** or become **Poisoned**. If the save fails by 5 or more, the target is also **Blinded**. The target may repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending both conditions on a success. Combat text: *Boggart Gasser hurls a vial of choking rotgas at (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | A; **Rotgas Vial** (10%) |
| **Comments** | “Breathe deep, pretty thing!”, “Cough for me!”, “Rot in your chest, slow and wet!”, “Gas for the lungs!”, “Heh—listen to ’em choke!”, “Don’t waste the good fumes!” |
| **Experience** | 50 |

---

## Notes

### Rare Drop
In addition to its normal loot, a Boggart Gasser has a chance to drop:
- **Rotgas Vial** — 10%

### Rotgas Vial Summary
A stoppered glass vial swirling with foul green vapor that burns the eyes and throat.
- non-magical
- thrown weapon
- as above
- single-use
- weight: 1 stone

# Chest Mimic

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Chest Mimic |
| **Description** | A ravenous, shape-shifting horror that lurks in the guise of a wooden chest. Its lid often sits slightly ajar, a glint of coin within to bait the greedy. Up close, the illusion falters—grain becomes flesh, hinges twitch, and the interior is lined with rows of grinding teeth. Its saliva carries a paralysing toxin, used to incapacitate prey before it is consumed. When it strikes, the chest snaps shut with violent hunger. Occasionally, a pair of gloves can be found within—remains of a thief who reached in and never withdrew their hands. |
| **Level** | 3 |

The target may repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. Combat text: *Chest Mimic snaps shut with a crushing, venom-laced bite on (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | 2 x C (roll twice); **Gloves of the Black Hand** (5%) |
| **Comments** | None |
| **Experience** | 100 |

---

## Notes

### Rare Drop
In addition to its normal loot, a Chest Mimic has a chance to drop:
- **Gloves of the Black Hand** — 5%

### Paralysis Note
A creature hit by the Chest Mimic’s **Bite** must make a **DC 13 Constitution save** or become **Paralyzed**.
- the target may repeat the save at the end of each of its turns
- the effect ends on a success

Its presence chills the air, frosting breath and dimming flame. Faint whispers coil around it—soft promises of endings yet to come. It drifts rather than walks, drawn to warmth and life, seeking to snuff both out with a deathly touch. |

If this effect reduces the target’s Strength to **0**, the target dies. Combat text: *Gloamshadow reaches out with a weakening, freezing touch toward (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | None |
| **Comments** | “The light fades...”, “You weaken...”, “All warmth dies...”, “Come into the dark...”, “You will not last...” |

Gloamshadows drift toward heat, light, and living breath, dimming their surroundings as they close.

content.name: bash

arguments.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

section = """## Traits\n\n| Trait | Effect |\n|---|---|\n| None | None |\n\n---\n\n"""

updated = []
for path in sorted(Path('umberhold/monsters').rglob('*.md')):
    if path.name == 'README.md':
        continue
    text = path.read_text()
    if '## Traits' in text:
        continue
    marker = '\n---\n\n## Notes\n'
    if marker in text:
        text = text.replace(marker, '\n---\n\n' + section + '## Notes\n', 1)
        path.write_text(text)
        updated.append(str(path))
    else:
        # fallback: append traits section at end
        text = text.rstrip() + '\n\n---\n\n' + section.rstrip() + '\n'
        path.write_text(text)
        updated.append(str(path))

print('\n'.join(updated))
PY

content.text:
# Boggart Boneboiler

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Boggart Boneboiler |
| **Description** | A bloated, greasy humanoid with slick skin and fat folds glistening under firelight. It reeks of burnt fat, spoiled meat, and sour sweat. Clad in a stained leather apron stretched tight over its bulk, it lumbers about with wet, slapping steps. Its small, beady eyes gleam with cruel delight as it tends to bubbling pots filled with bones and scraps, occasionally dragging victims closer to “the boil.” |
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Size** | Small (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Humanoid |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 12 (leather apron) |
| **Hit Points** | 2d6 + 2 |
| **Strength** | 12 (+1) |
| **Constitution** | 12 (+1) |
| **Agility** | 10 (+0) |
| **Intellect** | 8 (-1) |
| **Piety** | 6 (-2) |
| **Personality** | 10 (+0) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Meat Hook:** +3 to hit, range 1, 1d6 piercing; target suffers **Bleeding** (1d4 damage at the start of its next turn). Combat text: *Boggart Boneboiler lunges at (insert target) with a meat hook!* **Hurl Hot Grease:** +2 to hit, range 3, 2d4 fire damage; **recharge 6** (roll a d6 at the start of its turn and regain use on a 6); target is **Blinded** until the end of its next turn. Combat text: *Boggart Boneboiler hurls a pot of hot grease at (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | A; **Polished Finger Bone** (15%) |
| **Comments** | “Into the pot with ya!”, “Boil ’em slow, tastes better!”, “Oi, don’t waste the juices!”, “This one’ll make a fine broth!”, “Keep stirrin’, lads!”, “Boss wants this one salted!” |
| **Experience** | 50 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

---

## Notes

### Rare Drop
In addition to its normal loot, a Boggart Boneboiler has a chance to drop:
- **Polished Finger Bone** — 15%

### Polished Finger Bone Summary
A smooth, yellowed finger bone, carefully cleaned and buffed to a dull shine.
- non-magical
- worth 25 gp

### XP Note
The submitted stat block listed **25 XP**, but this entry uses **50 XP** to match the current Umberhold experience table for a **Level 2** monster.

# Chest Mimic

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Chest Mimic |
| **Description** | A ravenous, shape-shifting horror that lurks in the guise of a wooden chest. Its lid often sits slightly ajar, a glint of coin within to bait the greedy. Up close, the illusion falters—grain becomes flesh, hinges twitch, and the interior is lined with rows of grinding teeth. Its saliva carries a paralysing toxin, used to incapacitate prey before it is consumed. When it strikes, the chest snaps shut with violent hunger. Occasionally, a pair of gloves can be found within—remains of a thief who reached in and never withdrew their hands. |
| **Level** | 3 |
| **Size** | Medium (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Monstrosity |
| **Alignment** | Neutral |
| **AC** | 13 (natural armor) |
| **Hit Points** | 3d8 + 6 |
| **Strength** | 16 (+3) |
| **Constitution** | 14 (+2) |
| **Agility** | 8 (-1) |
| **Intellect** | 5 (-3) |
| **Piety** | 4 (-3) |
| **Personality** | 2 (-4) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Bite:** +5 to hit, range 1, 1d10 + 3 piercing damage; the target must make a **DC 13 Constitution save** or become **Paralyzed**. The target may repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. Combat text: *Chest Mimic snaps shut with a crushing, venom-laced bite on (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | 2 x C (roll twice); **Gloves of the Black Hand** (5%) |
| **Comments** | None |
| **Experience** | 100 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

---

## Notes

### Rare Drop
In addition to its normal loot, a Chest Mimic has a chance to drop:
- **Gloves of the Black Hand** — 5%

### Paralysis Note
A creature hit by the Chest Mimic’s **Bite** must make a **DC 13 Constitution save** or become **Paralyzed**.
- the target may repeat the save at the end of each of its turns
- the effect ends on a success

# Wulf

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Wulf |
| **Description** | A small, mangy beast with patchy fur and a hunched, underfed frame. Its ribs press against its skin, and its eyes glint with mean, hungry intelligence. Its fangs are yellowed and rotten, and its breath is foul with the stench of decay. It reeks of wet fur, rot, and filth. These creatures skitter and snap in packs, yapping and circling like vermin, often driven and controlled by their Boggart masters, darting in to bite before retreating. |
| **Level** | 1 |
| **Size** | Small (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Beast |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 12 (base 10 + Agility) |
| **Hit Points** | 1d6 |
| **Strength** | 12 (+1) |
| **Constitution** | 10 (+0) |
| **Agility** | 12 (+1) |
| **Intellect** | 4 (-3) |
| **Piety** | 4 (-3) |
| **Personality** | 6 (-2) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Agility +3 |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | Perception +2 |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Bite:** +3 to hit, range 1, 1d6 piercing. Combat text: *Wulf lunges at (insert target)!* Target must make a **DC 6 Constitution save** or contract **Festering Rot** *(disease; healing received is reduced by 50% until cured).* |
| **Treasure Type** | Nil; **Bone Collar** (1 in 25) |
| **Comments** | None |
| **Experience** | 25 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

---

## Notes

### Rare Drop
In addition to its normal loot, a Wulf has a rare chance to drop:
- **Bone Collar** — 1 in 25

### Bone Collar Summary
A crude bone collar carved by Boggart masters, etched with jagged symbols.
- non-magical
- worth 25 gp

### Disease Note
**Festering Rot** is currently described here as:
- healing received is reduced by 50% until cured

content.name: bash

arguments.command: find umberhold/monsters -type f -name '*.md' ! -name 'README.md' | sort | while read f; do if ! grep -q '^## Traits$' "$f"; then echo "$f"; fi; done

content.text:
Done.

Updated all existing monster files in:
- `umberhold/monsters/`
- `umberhold/monsters/5E/`

Each monster file now includes a `## Traits` section.
For monsters without special traits, I backfilled:

- `| None | None |`

I also verified there are no remaining monster files missing a `## Traits` section.

Here is Griselda, the boss of Gravenhollow Manor. 

# 📜 Boggart Boss: Griselda Rotmother


| Category                       | Details                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Name**                       | Griselda Rotmother                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Description**                | *A massive, bloated boggart matriarch, swollen with a lifetime of gluttony and indolence. Her bulk spills over itself in folds of greasy flesh, smeared with filth and scraps of half-eaten meat. She lounges amid refuse and bones, attended by lesser boggarts that scurry to feed her endless hunger. Her breath comes in wet, laboured wheezes, and her eyes gleam with cruel, sluggish cunning. When roused, she does not rise so much as heave herself forward, spewing filth and calling her kin to defend her.*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Level**                      | 4                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Size**                       | Large (2 squares on combat grid)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Type**                       | Humanoid                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Alignment**                  | Evil                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **AC**                         | 12 (filthy bulk)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Hit Points**                 | 4d8 + 12 (maximum 44)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Strength**                   | 16 (+3)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Constitution**               | 16 (+3)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Agility**                    | 6 (-2)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Intellect**                  | 10 (+0)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Piety**                      | 12 (+1)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Personality**                | 14 (+2)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Luck**                       | 10 (+0)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Proficiency Bonus**          | +2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Skill Proficiencies**        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities**     | None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Damage Resistances**         | None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Damage Immunities**          | None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Condition Immunities**       | None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Attacks**                    | **1.** *Griselda belches forth a torrent of bile and half-digested filth at (insert target)!* **Belch (Recharge 5/6):** +4 to hit, range 2; one enemy and one either side in the same rank (3 max); 2d6 acid damage; targets must make a **DC 12 Agility save** for half damage. **2.** *Griselda hurls a sloshing bucket of rotten food at (insert target)!* **Toss Bucket:** +4 to hit, range 3, 1d8 + 3 bludgeoning damage. **3.** *Griselda screeches and calls her kin to her side!* **Summon Boggart (Bonus Action, Recharge 5/6):** roll 1d6 — 1: Boggart Knifer, 2: Rotwing, 3: Boggart Gasser, 4: Boggart Bruiser, 5–6: Boggart Rotwife. The summoned creature appears in a vacant square on the combat grid; if there is no room, this action cannot be used. |
| **Treasure Type**              | Special (kept in a chest)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Comments**                   | *“Bring me more… MORE!”, “You look soft…”, “Feed me or die!”, “Come, my little worms!”, “I’ll eat your bones last…”*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Experience**                 | 200                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |

---

## Traits

| Trait         | Effect                                  |
| ------------- | --------------------------------------- |
| Boss Creature | Griselda always uses maximum hit points |

content.text:
# Umberhold Monsters

This folder contains individual monster entries for Umberhold.

---

## Monster Index

| Monster | Level | Size | Type | Notes |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| [Boggart Knifer](./boggart-knifer.md) | 1 | Small | Humanoid | Early weak skirmisher with a rare unique drop: **Boggart Cloak** |
| [Boggart Boneboiler](./boggart-boneboiler.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Grease-hurling boggart brute with a **Polished Finger Bone** drop |
| [Boggart Bruiser](./boggart-bruiser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Armored boggart enforcer with a serrated shortsword, shield, and gallstone sling |
| [Boggart Gasser](./boggart-gasser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Choking boggart bomb-thrower that lobs poisonous gas vials and may carry a **Rotgas Vial** |
| [Boggart Rotwife](./boggart-rotwife.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Filthy boggart crone that spits venom and croons a sleep-inducing **Rotwife’s Lullaby** |
| [Chest Mimic](./chest-mimic.md) | 3 | Medium | Monstrosity | False treasure chest predator with a paralyzing bite and a chance to contain **Gloves of the Black Hand** |
| [Gloamshadow](./gloamshadow.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead | Wavering undead shade with a freezing touch that drains **Strength** and can kill the helpless |
| [Grave Slurry](./grave-slurry.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead, Ooze | Heaving corpse-sludge that lashes with acid and threatens **MINOR ITEM DESTRUCTION** |
| [Marrow Muncher](./marrow-muncher.md) | 3 | Large | Giant | Reeking brute that smashes foes with an oversized club and hurls skulls from its grisly belt |
| [Rotwing](./rotwing.md) | 2 | Small | Monstrosity | Bat-winged blood parasite that causes **Bleeding** and spreads **Veinrot** |
| [Trow](./trow.md) | 4 | Large | Giant | Hulking troll-like brute with **Regeneration**, **Cringing Fury**, and a savage claw-and-bite multiattack |
| [Wulf](./wulf.md) | 1 | Small | Beast | Mangy pack beast with a diseased bite and a rare **Bone Collar** drop |

---

## Notes

- Use `umberhold/templates/monster-template.md` for new monster entries.
- Core monster rules are tracked in `umberhold/monster-stat-block-canon.md`.
- XP rules are tracked in `umberhold/experience-canon.md`.

# Trow

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Trow |
| **Description** | A hulking, hunched brute with long, stringy hair hanging in filthy ropes around its face. Its skin is thick, mottled, and slick with grime, stretched over knotted muscle. A jutting jaw lined with rotting, broken teeth gapes beneath small, suspicious eyes. The creature reeks of damp earth, spoiled meat, and old blood, its presence announced by stench before sight. Despite its bulk, it moves with a twitchy, animal wariness, lashing out in sudden bursts of violence. |
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Size** | Large (2 squares on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Giant |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 13 (natural armor) |
| **Hit Points** | 4d12 + 12 |
| **Strength** | 18 (+4) |
| **Constitution** | 16 (+3) |
| **Agility** | 10 (+0) |
| **Intellect** | 6 (-2) |
| **Piety** | 6 (-2) |
| **Personality** | 6 (-2) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +3 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Constitution +6 |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Multiattack:** The Trow makes two attacks, one with its claws and one with its bite. **Claw:** +7 to hit, range 1, 1d8 + 4 slashing damage. Combat text: *Trow rakes (insert target) with filthy claws!* **Bite:** +7 to hit, range 1, 1d10 + 4 piercing damage. Combat text: *Trow lunges forward and tears at (insert target) with its rotting maw!* |
| **Treasure Type** | C |
| **Comments** | “You taste good in stew...”, “Crunchy little bones...”, “I eat you slow...”, “Break you, then chew...”, “Me hungry!” |
| **Experience** | 200 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| **Regeneration** | The Trow regains 2d4 hit points at the start of its turn. |
| **Cringing Fury** | If the Trow takes 5 or more damage from a single attack, it becomes **Frightened** until the end of its next turn. |

# Boggart Rotwife

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Boggart Rotwife |
| **Description** | A hunched, string-haired crone daubed in ash, grease, and clotted herbs. Her skin hangs loose and mottled, marked with boils and ritual cuts, and her breath carries the sour stink of rot and old bile. Bone charms and fetishes clatter softly at her waist as she mutters to herself, eyes gleaming with spiteful cunning. She croons half-formed lullabies before unleashing foul magic, delighting in watching her victims falter and fade. |
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Size** | Small (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Humanoid |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 12 (base 10 + Agility + filthy wrappings) |
| **Hit Points** | 2d6 |
| **Strength** | 8 (-1) |
| **Constitution** | 10 (+0) |
| **Agility** | 12 (+1) |
| **Intellect** | 12 (+1) |
| **Piety** | 12 (+1) |
| **Personality** | 10 (+0) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Piety +3 |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Crude Club:** +1 to hit, range 1, 1d6 - 1 bludgeoning damage. Combat text: *Boggart Rotwife swings a crude club at (insert target)!* **Venomspit (Cantrip):** +3 to hit, range 3, 2d4 acid damage. Combat text: *Boggart Rotwife spits a glob of hissing venom at (insert target)!* **Rotwife’s Lullaby (Recharge 5/6):** range 3; one enemy and up to one adjacent ally on each side in the same rank (3 max); targets must make a **PIE save** or fall asleep. Each target may repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. Ends immediately for a target if it takes damage. Combat text: *Boggart Rotwife croons a foul lullaby at (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | B; **Silver Unholy Symbol** (5%) |
| **Comments** | “Sleep now, little meat...”, “Close them eyes... never wake...”, “Heh... dream of rot...”, “Soft flesh, soft mind...”, “Hush now... hush...” |
| **Experience** | 50 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

---

## Notes

### Rare Drop
In addition to its normal loot, a Boggart Rotwife has a chance to drop:
- **Silver Unholy Symbol** — 5%

### Silver Unholy Symbol Summary
A crude, tarnished icon etched with profane markings, sticky with old grime.
- mundane
- worth 25 gp

### Spell Note
**Rotwife’s Lullaby** affects one enemy and up to one adjacent ally on each side in the same rank, for a maximum of 3 targets. Sleeping targets may repeat the save at the end of each of their turns, and the effect ends immediately if a target takes damage.

content.thinking:
**Sorting monster names**

I’m figuring out the correct alphabetical order for monster names. I've got Griselda after Gloamshadow, right? But I should check if Gloamshadow actually comes before or after Grave. It looks like Gloamshadow goes before Grave. So, it’ll be Gloamshadow, Grave, and then Griselda, which fits in between Grave and Marrow. I'll note that Slurry gets inserted after Grave. Time to reference the current README, then I’ll write, copy, and edit as needed. Let’s keep moving!

arguments.content:
# Griselda Rotmother

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Griselda Rotmother |
| **Description** | A massive, bloated boggart matriarch, swollen with a lifetime of gluttony and indolence. Her bulk spills over itself in folds of greasy flesh, smeared with filth and scraps of half-eaten meat. She lounges amid refuse and bones, attended by lesser boggarts that scurry to feed her endless hunger. Her breath comes in wet, laboured wheezes, and her eyes gleam with cruel, sluggish cunning. When roused, she does not rise so much as heave herself forward, spewing filth and calling her kin to defend her. |
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Size** | Large (2 squares on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Humanoid |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 12 (filthy bulk) |
| **Hit Points** | 4d8 + 12 (maximum 44) |
| **Strength** | 16 (+3) |
| **Constitution** | 16 (+3) |
| **Agility** | 6 (-2) |
| **Intellect** | 10 (+0) |
| **Piety** | 12 (+1) |
| **Personality** | 14 (+2) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Belch (Recharge 5/6):** +4 to hit, range 2; one enemy and one either side in the same rank (3 max); 2d6 acid damage; targets must make a **DC 12 Agility save** for half damage. Combat text: *Griselda belches forth a torrent of bile and half-digested filth at (insert target)!* **Toss Bucket:** +4 to hit, range 3, 1d8 + 3 bludgeoning damage. Combat text: *Griselda hurls a sloshing bucket of rotten food at (insert target)!* **Summon Boggart (Bonus Action, Recharge 5/6):** roll 1d6 — 1: **Boggart Knifer**, 2: **Rotwing**, 3: **Boggart Gasser**, 4: **Boggart Bruiser**, 5-6: **Boggart Rotwife**. The summoned creature appears in a vacant square on the combat grid; if there is no room, this action cannot be used. Combat text: *Griselda screeches and calls her kin to her side!* |
| **Treasure Type** | Special (kept in a chest) |
| **Comments** | “Bring me more... MORE!”, “You look soft...”, “Feed me or die!”, “Come, my little worms!”, “I’ll eat your bones last...” |
| **Experience** | 200 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| **Boss Creature** | Griselda always uses maximum hit points. |

---

## Notes

### Boss Note
As a **Boss Creature**, Griselda always uses maximum hit points, for a total of **44 HP**.

### Summon Note
**Summon Boggart** is a bonus action with **Recharge 5/6**.
- roll **1d6** to determine the summoned creature
- the creature appears in a vacant square on the combat grid
- if there is no room, the action cannot be used
- results: **1** Boggart Knifer, **2** Rotwing, **3** Boggart Gasser, **4** Boggart Bruiser, **5-6** Boggart Rotwife

content.text:
# Griselda Rotmother

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Griselda Rotmother |
| **Description** | A massive, bloated boggart matriarch, swollen with a lifetime of gluttony and indolence. Her bulk spills over itself in folds of greasy flesh, smeared with filth and scraps of half-eaten meat. She lounges amid refuse and bones, attended by lesser boggarts that scurry to feed her endless hunger. Her breath comes in wet, laboured wheezes, and her eyes gleam with cruel, sluggish cunning. When roused, she does not rise so much as heave herself forward, spewing filth and calling her kin to defend her. |
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Size** | Large (2 squares on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Humanoid |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 12 (filthy bulk) |
| **Hit Points** | 4d8 + 12 (maximum 44) |
| **Strength** | 16 (+3) |
| **Constitution** | 16 (+3) |
| **Agility** | 6 (-2) |
| **Intellect** | 10 (+0) |
| **Piety** | 12 (+1) |
| **Personality** | 14 (+2) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Belch (Recharge 5/6):** +4 to hit, range 2; one enemy and one either side in the same rank (3 max); 2d6 acid damage; targets must make a **DC 12 Agility save** for half damage. Combat text: *Griselda belches forth a torrent of bile and half-digested filth at (insert target)!* **Toss Bucket:** +4 to hit, range 3, 1d8 + 3 bludgeoning damage. Combat text: *Griselda hurls a sloshing bucket of rotten food at (insert target)!* **Summon Boggart (Bonus Action, Recharge 5/6):** roll 1d6 — 1: **Boggart Knifer**, 2: **Rotwing**, 3: **Boggart Gasser**, 4: **Boggart Bruiser**, 5-6: **Boggart Rotwife**. The summoned creature appears in a vacant square on the combat grid; if there is no room, this action cannot be used. Combat text: *Griselda screeches and calls her kin to her side!* |
| **Treasure Type** | Special (kept in a chest) |
| **Comments** | “Bring me more... MORE!”, “You look soft...”, “Feed me or die!”, “Come, my little worms!”, “I’ll eat your bones last...” |
| **Experience** | 200 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| **Boss Creature** | Griselda always uses maximum hit points. |

---

## Notes

### Boss Note
As a **Boss Creature**, Griselda always uses maximum hit points, for a total of **44 HP**.

### Summon Note
**Summon Boggart** is a bonus action with **Recharge 5/6**.
- roll **1d6** to determine the summoned creature
- the creature appears in a vacant square on the combat grid
- if there is no room, the action cannot be used
- results: **1** Boggart Knifer, **2** Rotwing, **3** Boggart Gasser, **4** Boggart Bruiser, **5-6** Boggart Rotwife

# Umberhold Monster Stat Block Canon

This document captures the current approved generic monster stat block for Umberhold.

It defines the baseline fields used to build monster entries.

It does **not** modify `MASTER.md`.

---

## 1. Core Monster Fields

| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| Name | Name of the creature |
| Description | Describes the creature in detail, including appearance, odor, demeanor, behavior, and other sensory notes |
| Level | 1-20 |
| Size | Small, Medium, Large, Huge, or Gigantic |
| Type | Beast, Dragon, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, Giant, Humanoid, Insect, Monstrosity, Ooze, Plant, or Undead |
| Alignment | Good, Neutral, or Evil |
| AC | Base 10 when unarmored, modified by Agility, armor, and other effects |
| Hit Points | Determined by size and level |
| Strength | 3-30 |
| Constitution | 3-30 |
| Agility | 3-30 |
| Intellect | 3-30 |
| Piety | 3-30 |
| Personality | 3-30 |
| Luck | 3-30 |
| Proficiency Bonus | Based on level progression |
| Saving Throw Proficiencies | List of proficient saves |
| Skill Proficiencies | List of proficient skills |
| Damage Vulnerabilities | List of damage vulnerabilities |
| Damage Resistances | List of damage resistances |
| Damage Immunities | List of damage immunities |
| Condition Immunities | List of condition immunities |
| Attacks | List of attacks, including to-hit, damage, damage type, and special effects |
| Traits | Optional passive, reactive, or always-on monster abilities, usually presented in a separate trait section or table |
| Treasure Type | Treasure category from A-Z, based on treasure tables |
| Comments | Optional creature comments, including a 5% chance at the start of its turn to speak a random humorous line appropriate to its creature type |
| Experience | XP awarded to the party for slaying the monster |

---

## 2. Monster Level

Monsters use a **Level** value rather than an external challenge rating style label.

Current monster level range:
- **1-20**

---

## 3. Monster Size

Monster size categories are:
- Small
- Medium
- Large
- Huge
- Gigantic

### Combat Occupancy Mapping
Under Umberhold's current combat system, size maps to enemy rank occupancy as follows:
- Small = 1 slot
- Medium = 1 slot
- Large = 2 slots
- Huge = 3 slots
- Gigantic = 4 slots

---

## 4. Monster Types

The current approved monster types are:
- Beast
- Dragon
- Elemental
- Fey
- Fiend
- Giant
- Humanoid
- Insect
- Monstrosity
- Ooze
- Plant
- Undead

---

## 5. Alignment

The current approved alignment values are:
- Good
- Neutral
- Evil

---

## 6. Armor Class

Monster AC uses a base of **10** when unarmored.

AC may then be modified by:
- armor
- Agility bonus
- magical effects
- other special modifiers

---

## 7. Hit Point Progression by Size

Monster hit points are based on size.

| Size | Hit Dice per Level |
|---|---|
| Small | 1d6 per level |
| Medium | 1d8 per level |
| Large | 1d12 per level |
| Huge | 2d10 per level |
| Gigantic | 2d20 per level |

---

## 8. Core Attributes

All monsters use the same seven core attributes as player characters:
- Strength
- Constitution
- Agility
- Intellect
- Piety
- Personality
- Luck

Each attribute currently ranges from:
- **3-30**

---

## 9. Proficiency Bonus by Level

| Level Range | Proficiency Bonus |
|---|---|
| 1-3 | +2 |
| 4-6 | +3 |
| 7-9 | +4 |
| 10-12 | +5 |
| 13-15 | +6 |
| 16-18 | +7 |
| 19-20 | +8 |

---

## 10. Saving Throw and Skill Proficiencies

Monsters may have:
- saving throw proficiencies
- skill proficiencies

If a monster is proficient in a save or skill, it adds its proficiency bonus to the relevant roll.

---

## 11. Damage and Condition Defenses

Monster entries may include:
- damage vulnerabilities
- damage resistances
- damage immunities
- condition immunities

These should use Umberhold's current damage types and condition list.

---

## 12. Attacks

A monster's attack list should include, at minimum:
- attack name
- to-hit bonus
- damage
- damage type
- range
- any attached effects or conditions

### Attack Range Rule
Every monster attack must have a **range value from 1-3**.

---

## 13. Traits, Treasure, Comments, and Experience

### Traits
Each monster may include a **Traits** section.

This is used for passive, reactive, or always-on abilities such as:
- regeneration
- aura effects
- triggered behaviors
- special weaknesses or compulsions

### Treasure Type
Each monster may include a **Treasure Type** field from **A-Z**, based on Umberhold's treasure tables.

### Comments
Each monster may include a **Comments** field.

This currently supports flavor such as:
- a **5% chance** at the start of its turn to speak a random humorous line appropriate to its creature type

### Experience
Each monster should include an **Experience** value showing how much XP is awarded to the party for slaying it.

The exact XP values by monster level are maintained in:
- `umberhold/experience-canon.md`

---

## 14. Approved Rules Captured Here

This document locks in the following:
- monsters use Level rather than challenge rating
- current monster levels are 1-20
- monsters use the five size categories Small, Medium, Large, Huge, and Gigantic
- Small and Medium occupy 1 combat slot
- Large occupies 2 combat slots
- Huge occupies 3 combat slots
- Gigantic occupies 4 combat slots
- the current monster type list is Beast, Dragon, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, Giant, Humanoid, Insect, Monstrosity, Ooze, Plant, and Undead
- the current alignment values are Good, Neutral, and Evil
- unarmored AC starts at 10
- hit point dice scale by size category
- monsters use the same seven core attributes as player characters
- monster attributes currently range from 3-30
- proficiency bonus follows the current level progression table
- monster entries include a Description field
- monster entries include saving throw proficiencies and skill proficiencies
- monster entries may include damage vulnerabilities, damage resistances, damage immunities, and condition immunities
- monster entries may include a Traits section for passive, reactive, or always-on abilities
- monster entries include attacks and XP value
- monster entries may include Treasure Type and Comments

---

## 15. Still Open for Later Canonization

The following are still open and may need later clarification:
- whether monster hit points use only size dice or also add Constitution-derived bonuses by level
- whether alignment has any systemic effect beyond lore and spell interaction
- the full canonical skill list used by monsters and characters
- whether monster spellcasters follow player spell slot rules or use bespoke spellcasting packages

---

## 16. Implementation Note

This file is a standalone approved rules sheet.
It does **not** modify `MASTER.md`.

# Umberhold Monsters

This folder contains individual monster entries for Umberhold.

---

## Monster Index

| Monster | Level | Size | Type | Notes |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| [Boggart Knifer](./boggart-knifer.md) | 1 | Small | Humanoid | Early weak skirmisher with a rare unique drop: **Boggart Cloak** |
| [Boggart Boneboiler](./boggart-boneboiler.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Grease-hurling boggart brute with a **Polished Finger Bone** drop |
| [Boggart Bruiser](./boggart-bruiser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Armored boggart enforcer with a serrated shortsword, shield, and gallstone sling |
| [Boggart Gasser](./boggart-gasser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Choking boggart bomb-thrower that lobs poisonous gas vials and may carry a **Rotgas Vial** |
| [Boggart Rotwife](./boggart-rotwife.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Filthy boggart crone that spits venom and croons a sleep-inducing **Rotwife’s Lullaby** |
| [Chest Mimic](./chest-mimic.md) | 3 | Medium | Monstrosity | False treasure chest predator with a paralyzing bite and a chance to contain **Gloves of the Black Hand** |
| [Gloamshadow](./gloamshadow.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead | Wavering undead shade with a freezing touch that drains **Strength** and can kill the helpless |
| [Grave Slurry](./grave-slurry.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead, Ooze | Heaving corpse-sludge that lashes with acid and threatens **MINOR ITEM DESTRUCTION** |
| [Griselda Rotmother](./griselda-rotmother.md) | 4 | Large | Humanoid | Bloated boggart manor boss with a foul bile belch, reinforcements, and the **Boss Creature** trait |
| [Marrow Muncher](./marrow-muncher.md) | 3 | Large | Giant | Reeking brute that smashes foes with an oversized club and hurls skulls from its grisly belt |
| [Rotwing](./rotwing.md) | 2 | Small | Monstrosity | Bat-winged blood parasite that causes **Bleeding** and spreads **Veinrot** |
| [Trow](./trow.md) | 4 | Large | Giant | Hulking troll-like brute with **Regeneration**, **Cringing Fury**, and a savage claw-and-bite multiattack |
| [Wulf](./wulf.md) | 1 | Small | Beast | Mangy pack beast with a diseased bite and a rare **Bone Collar** drop |

---

## Notes

- Use `umberhold/templates/monster-template.md` for new monster entries.
- Core monster rules are tracked in `umberhold/monster-stat-block-canon.md`.
- XP rules are tracked in `umberhold/experience-canon.md`.

arguments.content:
# Gleaming Halberd

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Gleaming Halberd |
| **Description** | A hovering halberd, polished to an unnatural shine, drifting silently through the air as if held by unseen hands. Its blade gleams with obsessive care, catching even the faintest light. It chatters constantly in a shrill, self-satisfied tone, boasting of its sharpness and mocking the appearance of its foes. When it attacks, it darts forward with sudden precision, its edge flashing in clean, practiced arcs. |
| **Level** | 1 |
| **Size** | Medium (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Construct |
| **Alignment** | Neutral |
| **AC** | 13 (hardened steel) |
| **Hit Points** | 1d8 + 2 |
| **Strength** | 12 (+1) |
| **Constitution** | 12 (+1) |
| **Agility** | 14 (+2) |
| **Intellect** | 10 (+0) |
| **Piety** | 6 (-2) |
| **Personality** | 12 (+1) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | Poison |
| **Condition Immunities** | Poisoned |
| **Attacks** | **Halberd Strike:** +4 to hit, range 2, 1d10 + 1 slashing damage. Combat text: *Gleaming Halberd sweeps in a flashing arc toward (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | None |
| **Comments** | “I’ll chop your head clean off—if that warty thing is a head!”, “I was cleaned yesterday—look how I shine!”, “Stand still, I prefer a clean cut!”, “Oh, this will be neat!” |
| **Experience** | 25 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

---

## Notes

### Construct Note
Gleaming Halberds are animated weapons of polished steel, floating and striking without any visible wielder.

content.text:
# Gleaming Halberd

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Gleaming Halberd |
| **Description** | A hovering halberd, polished to an unnatural shine, drifting silently through the air as if held by unseen hands. Its blade gleams with obsessive care, catching even the faintest light. It chatters constantly in a shrill, self-satisfied tone, boasting of its sharpness and mocking the appearance of its foes. When it attacks, it darts forward with sudden precision, its edge flashing in clean, practiced arcs. |
| **Level** | 1 |
| **Size** | Medium (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Construct |
| **Alignment** | Neutral |
| **AC** | 13 (hardened steel) |
| **Hit Points** | 1d8 + 2 |
| **Strength** | 12 (+1) |
| **Constitution** | 12 (+1) |
| **Agility** | 14 (+2) |
| **Intellect** | 10 (+0) |
| **Piety** | 6 (-2) |
| **Personality** | 12 (+1) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | Poison |
| **Condition Immunities** | Poisoned |
| **Attacks** | **Halberd Strike:** +4 to hit, range 2, 1d10 + 1 slashing damage. Combat text: *Gleaming Halberd sweeps in a flashing arc toward (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | None |
| **Comments** | “I’ll chop your head clean off—if that warty thing is a head!”, “I was cleaned yesterday—look how I shine!”, “Stand still, I prefer a clean cut!”, “Oh, this will be neat!” |
| **Experience** | 25 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

---

## Notes

### Construct Note
Gleaming Halberds are animated weapons of polished steel, floating and striking without any visible wielder.

# Umberhold Monster Stat Block Canon

This document captures the current approved generic monster stat block for Umberhold.

It defines the baseline fields used to build monster entries.

It does **not** modify `MASTER.md`.

---

## 1. Core Monster Fields

| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| Name | Name of the creature |
| Description | Describes the creature in detail, including appearance, odor, demeanor, behavior, and other sensory notes |
| Level | 1-20 |
| Size | Small, Medium, Large, Huge, or Gigantic |
| Type | Beast, Construct, Dragon, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, Giant, Humanoid, Insect, Monstrosity, Ooze, Plant, or Undead |
| Alignment | Good, Neutral, or Evil |
| AC | Base 10 when unarmored, modified by Agility, armor, and other effects |
| Hit Points | Determined by size and level |
| Strength | 3-30 |
| Constitution | 3-30 |
| Agility | 3-30 |
| Intellect | 3-30 |
| Piety | 3-30 |
| Personality | 3-30 |
| Luck | 3-30 |
| Proficiency Bonus | Based on level progression |
| Saving Throw Proficiencies | List of proficient saves |
| Skill Proficiencies | List of proficient skills |
| Damage Vulnerabilities | List of damage vulnerabilities |
| Damage Resistances | List of damage resistances |
| Damage Immunities | List of damage immunities |
| Condition Immunities | List of condition immunities |
| Attacks | List of attacks, including to-hit, damage, damage type, and special effects |
| Traits | Optional passive, reactive, or always-on monster abilities, usually presented in a separate trait section or table |
| Treasure Type | Treasure category from A-Z, based on treasure tables |
| Comments | Optional creature comments, including a 5% chance at the start of its turn to speak a random humorous line appropriate to its creature type |
| Experience | XP awarded to the party for slaying the monster |

---

## 2. Monster Level

Monsters use a **Level** value rather than an external challenge rating style label.

Current monster level range:
- **1-20**

---

## 3. Monster Size

Monster size categories are:
- Small
- Medium
- Large
- Huge
- Gigantic

### Combat Occupancy Mapping
Under Umberhold's current combat system, size maps to enemy rank occupancy as follows:
- Small = 1 slot
- Medium = 1 slot
- Large = 2 slots
- Huge = 3 slots
- Gigantic = 4 slots

---

## 4. Monster Types

The current approved monster types are:
- Beast
- Construct
- Dragon
- Elemental
- Fey
- Fiend
- Giant
- Humanoid
- Insect
- Monstrosity
- Ooze
- Plant
- Undead

---

## 5. Alignment

The current approved alignment values are:
- Good
- Neutral
- Evil

---

## 6. Armor Class

Monster AC uses a base of **10** when unarmored.

AC may then be modified by:
- armor
- Agility bonus
- magical effects
- other special modifiers

---

## 7. Hit Point Progression by Size

Monster hit points are based on size.

| Size | Hit Dice per Level |
|---|---|
| Small | 1d6 per level |
| Medium | 1d8 per level |

| **Personality**                | 4 (-3)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Luck**                       | 10 (+0)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| **Skill Proficiencies**        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |

| **Damage Resistances**         | None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Damage Immunities**          | Poison                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Condition Immunities**       | Poisoned                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |

| **Treasure Type**              | 10% chance to contain two random 50 gp gemstones (set as eyes)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

| **Experience**                 | 50                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |

content.text:
# Umberhold Monsters

This folder contains individual monster entries for Umberhold.

---

## Monster Index

| Monster | Level | Size | Type | Notes |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| [Boggart Knifer](./boggart-knifer.md) | 1 | Small | Humanoid | Early weak skirmisher with a rare unique drop: **Boggart Cloak** |
| [Boggart Boneboiler](./boggart-boneboiler.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Grease-hurling boggart brute with a **Polished Finger Bone** drop |
| [Boggart Bruiser](./boggart-bruiser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Armored boggart enforcer with a serrated shortsword, shield, and gallstone sling |
| [Boggart Gasser](./boggart-gasser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Choking boggart bomb-thrower that lobs poisonous gas vials and may carry a **Rotgas Vial** |
| [Boggart Rotwife](./boggart-rotwife.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Filthy boggart crone that spits venom and croons a sleep-inducing **Rotwife’s Lullaby** |
| [Chest Mimic](./chest-mimic.md) | 3 | Medium | Monstrosity | False treasure chest predator with a paralyzing bite and a chance to contain **Gloves of the Black Hand** |
| [Gleaming Halberd](./gleaming-halberd.md) | 1 | Medium | Construct | Hovering animated halberd with a shrill tongue, hardened steel body, and a long-reaching **Halberd Strike** |
| [Gloamshadow](./gloamshadow.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead | Wavering undead shade with a freezing touch that drains **Strength** and can kill the helpless |
| [Grave Slurry](./grave-slurry.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead, Ooze | Heaving corpse-sludge that lashes with acid and threatens **MINOR ITEM DESTRUCTION** |
| [Griselda Rotmother](./griselda-rotmother.md) | 4 | Large | Humanoid | Bloated boggart manor boss with a foul bile belch, reinforcements, and the **Boss Creature** trait |
| [Marrow Muncher](./marrow-muncher.md) | 3 | Large | Giant | Reeking brute that smashes foes with an oversized club and hurls skulls from its grisly belt |
| [Rotwing](./rotwing.md) | 2 | Small | Monstrosity | Bat-winged blood parasite that causes **Bleeding** and spreads **Veinrot** |
| [Trow](./trow.md) | 4 | Large | Giant | Hulking troll-like brute with **Regeneration**, **Cringing Fury**, and a savage claw-and-bite multiattack |
| [Wulf](./wulf.md) | 1 | Small | Beast | Mangy pack beast with a diseased bite and a rare **Bone Collar** drop |

---

## Notes

- Use `umberhold/templates/monster-template.md` for new monster entries.
- Core monster rules are tracked in `umberhold/monster-stat-block-canon.md`.
- XP rules are tracked in `umberhold/experience-canon.md`.

# Gleaming Halberd

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Gleaming Halberd |
| **Description** | A hovering halberd, polished to an unnatural shine, drifting silently through the air as if held by unseen hands. Its blade gleams with obsessive care, catching even the faintest light. It chatters constantly in a shrill, self-satisfied tone, boasting of its sharpness and mocking the appearance of its foes. When it attacks, it darts forward with sudden precision, its edge flashing in clean, practiced arcs. |
| **Level** | 1 |
| **Size** | Medium (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Construct |
| **Alignment** | Neutral |
| **AC** | 13 (hardened steel) |
| **Hit Points** | 1d8 + 2 |
| **Strength** | 12 (+1) |
| **Constitution** | 12 (+1) |
| **Agility** | 14 (+2) |
| **Intellect** | 10 (+0) |
| **Piety** | 6 (-2) |
| **Personality** | 12 (+1) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | Poison |
| **Condition Immunities** | Poisoned |
| **Attacks** | **Halberd Strike:** +4 to hit, range 2, 1d10 + 1 slashing damage. Combat text: *Gleaming Halberd sweeps in a flashing arc toward (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | None |
| **Comments** | “I’ll chop your head clean off—if that warty thing is a head!”, “I was cleaned yesterday—look how I shine!”, “Stand still, I prefer a clean cut!”, “Oh, this will be neat!” |
| **Experience** | 25 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

---

## Notes

### Construct Note
Gleaming Halberds are animated weapons of polished steel, floating and striking without any visible wielder.

content.text:
# Poppet of Pins

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Poppet of Pins |
| **Description** | A small, stitched doll of rag and sinew, its body bound with tight, black thread. It hovers silently, limbs twitching in jerky, unnatural motions as if pulled by unseen strings. Its face is crudely sewn, save for a pair of dull gemstones set where eyes should be. From its hands extend long, rusted needles, glistening with a sickly toxin. It drifts toward the living with quiet intent, striking with sudden, precise jabs. |
| **Level** | 2 |
| **Size** | Small (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Construct |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 13 |
| **Hit Points** | 2d6 + 2 |
| **Strength** | 6 (-2) |
| **Constitution** | 12 (+1) |
| **Agility** | 16 (+3) |
| **Intellect** | 6 (-2) |
| **Piety** | 8 (-1) |
| **Personality** | 4 (-3) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +2 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | Fire |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | Poison |
| **Condition Immunities** | Poisoned |
| **Attacks** | **Poison Needle:** +5 to hit, range 1, 1 piercing damage; the target must make a **Constitution save** or take **2d4 poison damage**, or half damage on a success. Combat text: *Poppet of Pins darts forward, jabbing a rusted needle into (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | 10% chance to contain two random 50 gp gemstones (set as eyes) |
| **Comments** | “A faint stitching sound...”, “snip... stitch... snip...”, “A soft, childlike giggle”, “Needles twitch eagerly”, “Threads tighten as it strikes” |
| **Experience** | 50 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

- **two random 50 gp gemstones** set as its eyes

Poppets of Pins hover and twitch like puppets on invisible strings, striking with poisoned needles before drifting back out of reach.
