content.text:
# Umberhold Monsters

This folder contains individual monster entries for Umberhold.

---

## Monster Index

| Monster | Level | Size | Type | Notes |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| [Boggart Knifer](./boggart-knifer.md) | 1 | Small | Humanoid | Early weak skirmisher with a rare unique drop: **Boggart Cloak** |
| [Boggart Boneboiler](./boggart-boneboiler.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Grease-hurling boggart brute with a **Polished Finger Bone** drop |
| [Boggart Bruiser](./boggart-bruiser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Armored boggart enforcer with a serrated shortsword, shield, and gallstone sling |
| [Boggart Gasser](./boggart-gasser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Choking boggart bomb-thrower that lobs poisonous gas vials and may carry a **Rotgas Vial** |
| [Boggart Rotwife](./boggart-rotwife.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Filthy boggart crone that spits venom and croons a sleep-inducing **Rotwife’s Lullaby** |
| [Chest Mimic](./chest-mimic.md) | 3 | Medium | Monstrosity | False treasure chest predator with a paralyzing bite and a chance to contain **Gloves of the Black Hand** |
| [Gleaming Halberd](./gleaming-halberd.md) | 1 | Medium | Construct | Hovering animated halberd with a shrill tongue, hardened steel body, and a long-reaching **Halberd Strike** |
| [Gloamshadow](./gloamshadow.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead | Wavering undead shade with a freezing touch that drains **Strength** and can kill the helpless |
| [Grave Slurry](./grave-slurry.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead, Ooze | Heaving corpse-sludge that lashes with acid and threatens **MINOR ITEM DESTRUCTION** |
| [Griselda Rotmother](./griselda-rotmother.md) | 4 | Large | Humanoid | Bloated boggart manor boss with a foul bile belch, reinforcements, and the **Boss Creature** trait |
| [Marrow Muncher](./marrow-muncher.md) | 3 | Large | Giant | Reeking brute that smashes foes with an oversized club and hurls skulls from its grisly belt |
| [Poppet of Pins](./poppet-of-pins.md) | 2 | Small | Construct | Hovering stitched doll construct with poisoned needle jabs and gemstone eyes |
| [Rotwing](./rotwing.md) | 2 | Small | Monstrosity | Bat-winged blood parasite that causes **Bleeding** and spreads **Veinrot** |
| [Trow](./trow.md) | 4 | Large | Giant | Hulking troll-like brute with **Regeneration**, **Cringing Fury**, and a savage claw-and-bite multiattack |
| [Wulf](./wulf.md) | 1 | Small | Beast | Mangy pack beast with a diseased bite and a rare **Bone Collar** drop |

---

## Notes

- Use `umberhold/templates/monster-template.md` for new monster entries.
- Core monster rules are tracked in `umberhold/monster-stat-block-canon.md`.
- XP rules are tracked in `umberhold/experience-canon.md`.

# Trow

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Trow |
| **Description** | A hulking, hunched brute with long, stringy hair hanging in filthy ropes around its face. Its skin is thick, mottled, and slick with grime, stretched over knotted muscle. A jutting jaw lined with rotting, broken teeth gapes beneath small, suspicious eyes. The creature reeks of damp earth, spoiled meat, and old blood, its presence announced by stench before sight. Despite its bulk, it moves with a twitchy, animal wariness, lashing out in sudden bursts of violence. |
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Size** | Large (2 squares on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Giant |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 13 (natural armor) |
| **Hit Points** | 4d12 + 12 |
| **Strength** | 18 (+4) |
| **Constitution** | 16 (+3) |
| **Agility** | 10 (+0) |
| **Intellect** | 6 (-2) |
| **Piety** | 6 (-2) |
| **Personality** | 6 (-2) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +3 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | Constitution +6 |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Multiattack:** The Trow makes two attacks, one with its claws and one with its bite. **Claw:** +7 to hit, range 1, 1d8 + 4 slashing damage. Combat text: *Trow rakes (insert target) with filthy claws!* **Bite:** +7 to hit, range 1, 1d10 + 4 piercing damage. Combat text: *Trow lunges forward and tears at (insert target) with its rotting maw!* |
| **Treasure Type** | C |
| **Comments** | “You taste good in stew...”, “Crunchy little bones...”, “I eat you slow...”, “Break you, then chew...”, “Me hungry!” |
| **Experience** | 200 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| **Regeneration** | The Trow regains 2d4 hit points at the start of its turn. |
| **Cringing Fury** | If the Trow takes 5 or more damage from a single attack, it becomes **Frightened** until the end of its next turn. |

arguments.content:
# Widowgrin

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Widowgrin |
| **Description** | A bloated spider-creature bearing a warped, human face stretched across its thorax. Its dead eyes stare without blinking, lips twitching in faint, unnatural expressions. Its legs move with deliberate precision, and from its abdomen spills thick webbing that clings like grave-silk. A barbed stinger drips with dark venom, striking with cruel intent. |
| **Level** | 4 |
| **Size** | Medium (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Monstrosity |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 14 |
| **Hit Points** | 4d8 + 4 |
| **Strength** | 12 (+1) |
| **Constitution** | 12 (+1) |
| **Agility** | 14 (+2) |
| **Intellect** | 6 (-2) |
| **Piety** | 8 (-1) |
| **Personality** | 5 (-3) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +3 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | Stealth +5 |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Sting:** +5 to hit, range 1, 1d8 piercing damage; the target must make a **DC 13 Constitution save** or take 2d6 poison damage, or half damage on a success. Combat text: *Widowgrin lunges forward, driving its venomous stinger into (insert target)!* **Web (Bonus Action):** range 3, **DC 13 Dexterity save** or become **Webbed (Paralyzed)**. A webbed target can use its action to make a **DC 13 Strength check** to escape. **Recharge 5-6.** Combat text: *Widowgrin squirts a mass of clinging webbing toward (insert target), binding them fast!* |
| **Treasure Type** | None |
| **Comments** | “Come closer... I won’t bite...”, “Your face... I remember that face...”, “Stay still... it won’t hurt long...”, “So warm... so very warm...”, “Don’t struggle... it makes the web tighter...” |
| **Experience** | 150 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| **Harvestable** | A Shadowman can attempt to harvest poison from the corpse of this creature. |

Its movements are slow but purposeful, each step heavy with the weight of the grave. Their tombs are often targeted by grave robbers, and those who disturb them awaken something cold and vengeful. arguments.content:
# Barrow Wight

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Barrow Wight |
| **Description** | A gaunt, corpse-pale figure wrapped in rotting burial cloths, its hollow eyes burning with a cold, dim light. Its movements are slow but purposeful, each step heavy with the weight of the grave. These are the dead of nobles and royals, buried with precious things to take into the afterlife—riches that draw the greedy and desperate. Their tombs are often targeted by grave robbers, and those who disturb them awaken something cold and vengeful. A chill clings to it, and the air grows still in its presence, as if sound itself recoils from the dead. |
| **Level** | 5 |
| **Size** | Medium (1 square on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Undead |
| **Alignment** | Evil |
| **AC** | 14 |
| **Hit Points** | 5d8 + 10 |
| **Strength** | 12 (+1) |
| **Constitution** | 14 (+2) |
| **Agility** | 10 (+0) |
| **Intellect** | 8 (-1) |
| **Piety** | 12 (+1) |
| **Personality** | 6 (-2) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +3 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | Slashing, Piercing, and Bludgeoning from non-silvered, non-magical weapons |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Grave Touch:** +4 to hit, range 1, 2d6 necrotic damage; the target cannot be healed until the end of its next turn. Combat text: *The Barrow Wight lays a deathly hand upon (insert target), draining warmth and life!* **Grave Stare (Bonus Action):** range 3; the target must make a **DC 13 Piety save** or become **Frightened**. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. Once a creature succeeds on this save, it is immune to this effect for the rest of the combat. **Recharge 5-6.** Combat text: *The Barrow Wight locks its hollow gaze onto (insert target), filling them with dread!* |
| **Treasure Type** | D |
| **Comments** | “Back... to the earth...”, “No breath... no warmth...”, “Lie down... rest...”, “All things end in soil...”, “The grave calls you...” |
| **Experience** | 200 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

content.text:
# Umberhold Monsters

This folder contains individual monster entries for Umberhold.

---

## Monster Index

| Monster | Level | Size | Type | Notes |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| [Boggart Knifer](./boggart-knifer.md) | 1 | Small | Humanoid | Early weak skirmisher with a rare unique drop: **Boggart Cloak** |
| [Boggart Boneboiler](./boggart-boneboiler.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Grease-hurling boggart brute with a **Polished Finger Bone** drop |
| [Boggart Bruiser](./boggart-bruiser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Armored boggart enforcer with a serrated shortsword, shield, and gallstone sling |
| [Boggart Gasser](./boggart-gasser.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Choking boggart bomb-thrower that lobs poisonous gas vials and may carry a **Rotgas Vial** |
| [Boggart Rotwife](./boggart-rotwife.md) | 2 | Small | Humanoid | Filthy boggart crone that spits venom and croons a sleep-inducing **Rotwife’s Lullaby** |
| [Barrow Wight](./barrow-wight.md) | 5 | Medium | Undead | Noble tomb-undead with a healing-blocking **Grave Touch** and dread-inducing **Grave Stare** |
| [Chest Mimic](./chest-mimic.md) | 3 | Medium | Monstrosity | False treasure chest predator with a paralyzing bite and a chance to contain **Gloves of the Black Hand** |
| [Gleaming Halberd](./gleaming-halberd.md) | 1 | Medium | Construct | Hovering animated halberd with a shrill tongue, hardened steel body, and a long-reaching **Halberd Strike** |
| [Gloamshadow](./gloamshadow.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead | Wavering undead shade with a freezing touch that drains **Strength** and can kill the helpless |
| [Grave Slurry](./grave-slurry.md) | 2 | Medium | Undead, Ooze | Heaving corpse-sludge that lashes with acid and threatens **MINOR ITEM DESTRUCTION** |
| [Griselda Rotmother](./griselda-rotmother.md) | 4 | Large | Humanoid | Bloated boggart manor boss with a foul bile belch, reinforcements, and the **Boss Creature** trait |
| [Marrow Muncher](./marrow-muncher.md) | 3 | Large | Giant | Reeking brute that smashes foes with an oversized club and hurls skulls from its grisly belt |
| [Poppet of Pins](./poppet-of-pins.md) | 2 | Small | Construct | Hovering stitched doll construct with poisoned needle jabs and gemstone eyes |
| [Rotwing](./rotwing.md) | 2 | Small | Monstrosity | Bat-winged blood parasite that causes **Bleeding** and spreads **Veinrot** |
| [Trow](./trow.md) | 4 | Large | Giant | Hulking troll-like brute with **Regeneration**, **Cringing Fury**, and a savage claw-and-bite multiattack |
| [Widowgrin](./widowgrin.md) | 4 | Medium | Monstrosity | Human-faced spider horror with venomous sting, binding webs, and the **Harvestable** trait |
| [Wulf](./wulf.md) | 1 | Small | Beast | Mangy pack beast with a diseased bite and a rare **Bone Collar** drop |

---

## Notes

- Use `umberhold/templates/monster-template.md` for new monster entries.
- Core monster rules are tracked in `umberhold/monster-stat-block-canon.md`.
- XP rules are tracked in `umberhold/experience-canon.md`.

arguments.content:
# Coffin Mimic

## Stat Block

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Coffin Mimic |
| **Description** | A hulking, stone sarcophagus that lies still among the dead—until it moves. Its lid splits into a jagged maw lined with broken, tomb-like teeth, and its interior is a hollow darkness that reeks of decay. When it strikes, it lunges forward with horrifying force, slamming and biting with crushing weight. Ancient grave dust spills from within, choking and blinding those who draw too close. |
| **Level** | 6 |
| **Size** | Large (2 squares on combat grid) |
| **Type** | Monstrosity |
| **Alignment** | Neutral |
| **AC** | 15 |
| **Hit Points** | 6d12 + 12 |
| **Strength** | 18 (+4) |
| **Constitution** | 14 (+2) |
| **Agility** | 8 (-1) |
| **Intellect** | 5 (-3) |
| **Piety** | 6 (-2) |
| **Personality** | 3 (-4) |
| **Luck** | 10 (+0) |
| **Proficiency Bonus** | +3 |
| **Saving Throw Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Skill Proficiencies** | None listed |
| **Damage Vulnerabilities** | None |
| **Damage Resistances** | None |
| **Damage Immunities** | None |
| **Condition Immunities** | None |
| **Attacks** | **Multiattack:** The Coffin Mimic makes two attacks: one **Bite** and one **Bash**. **Bite:** +7 to hit, range 1, 2d8 + 4 piercing damage. Combat text: *The Coffin Mimic snaps its jagged stone maw onto (insert target)!* **Bash:** +7 to hit, range 1, 1d10 + 4 bludgeoning damage. Combat text: *The Coffin Mimic lunges forward, slamming its massive bulk into (insert target)!* **Dust Spit (Bonus Action):** range 1 (affects 1 rank); the target must make a **DC 13 Dexterity save** or become **Blinded** for 1 minute. **Recharge 5-6.** Combat text: *The Coffin Mimic bursts open, spewing choking grave dust into (insert target)!* |
| **Treasure Type** | D x2; **Bonepick Key** (5%) |
| **Comments** | None |
| **Experience** | 300 |

---

## Traits

| Trait | Effect |
|---|---|
| None | None |

---

## Notes

### Rare Drop
In addition to its normal loot, a Coffin Mimic has a chance to contain:
- **Bonepick Key** — 5%

### Dust Spit Note
**Dust Spit** affects **1 rank** at **range 1**.
- targets must make a **DC 13 Dexterity save** or become **Blinded** for **1 minute**
- **Recharge 5-6**
